name: accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor payments/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor payments/month, inefficient tracking causes late payments and supplier penalties. We provide consolidated payment status reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and reporting vendor payment statuses efficiently.
features: manual entry of vendor payment statuses
